notes: Dominant fix type is golden file drift (automatable). make update-golden already exists. Turn avg 119.5 vs 15-20 target.
All 9 runs flagged resource_heavy + poor_agentic_control. Outlier 4.2M/62-turn run from PR review test complexity. Per-request cost ~64K stable, so turn reduction is primary lever.
Root cause: gh aw compile * pattern blocks /tmp/ absolute paths. 2/2 runs show identical 129-131 turn failure → source code fallback. Fix tool pattern to allow /tmp/*.md paths.

All 9 non-trivial runs flagged partially_reducible (50-96% data-gathering turns). Pre-fetching PR diff + file list in bash pre-steps is primary lever. Also remove repos toolset and 3 unused bash tools.

45% failure rate across 11 runs. Runaway 103-turn failed run consumed 9.1M tokens (75% of daily total). Primary lever: reduce timeout-minutes 15→10 + remove Serena import (unused Go LSP for .md optimization). No max-turns available for Copilot engine.

Root causes: (1) list_issues fetches 120-125KB all-issues payload before using search_issues no:label. (2) 59-60 ghost search_repositories calls all fail with unknown tool. (3) bash parsing failures (python3/node not allowed). (4) Model overkill for label classification.

Single run (55 turns vs target 30). agentic_fraction=0.50, read_only actuation. Primary lever: bash pre-step to run deadcode+filter cache saves ~15 turns. Also remove pull_requests toolset and reduce timeout 30→20min.

64% cancellation rate (9/14 runs); all 14 runs from push-to-main trigger on single day. 1.17M tokens wasted on cancelled runs (40%). Primary fix: add paths filter to push trigger. Also: remove reaction/status-comment triggers, cap cache-memory haiku scan to last 10 files.
26/45 runs partially_reducible (58%), 9/45 resource_heavy. Avg 8 turns, agentic_fraction=0.5. Primary lever: pre-step deterministic test collection to reduce turns.

Single run, 47 turns, read_only, agentic_fraction=0.50. Primary lever: bash pre-step to collect all file metrics upfront (~800K-1M tokens). Also remove repos toolset, edit tool, and simplify per-violation suggestions.

Single run, 60 turns vs 3-page target (20-25 expected). agentic_fraction=0.5. 6 shared imports, no max-turns, npm install done agentically. Primary lever: bash pre-steps for npm install+server+IP (~10 turns), max-turns: 25 cap, prompt slimming.

Single run, 56 turns, resource_heavy_for_domain (high severity), partially_reducible (agentic_fraction=0.50). Primary lever: bash pre-steps for workflow discovery (Phase 1) + compiler setup (~8-10 turns). Add max-turns:35 cap. Remove Category C error scenarios. Reduce scoring rubric in prompt.

workflow_name: Daily Firewall Logs Collector and Reporter
notes: Single run, 35 turns, 94% data-gathering (agentic_fraction=0.06). Primary lever: pre-step bash batch audit to collect all run data before agent starts (~15 turns saved). Also: move chart generation to pre-step, replace github:all with github:[discussions], add max-turns:40, remove edit tool.
